narratives.Overview: Periodic meditation sounds layered over the noise bed: bell, chime, drones, and omm voices now, with an extensible registry for deep tones inspired by Manding music (Mali/Guinea) to be specified later. Hybrid production: samples where realism matters (bell, chime), synthesis where flexibility matters (drones, omm, deep tones).
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Sound library with bell and chime (samples) and drone and omm (synthesized) voices. FR-2: Per-sound enable, volume, interval, and optional randomized jitter, all saved into presets. FR-3: Sound registry is extensible so new voices (Manding-inspired deep tones) can be added without reworking the scheduler. NFR-1: Scheduling is driven by the AudioContext clock and stays accurate in background tabs. NFR-2: Tones mix over the noise bed without clipping (headroom/limiting on the master bus).

items.title: Voice registry with sample and synth voice types
Per-sound scheduler (interval, jitter, volume) on the audio clock
Mix bus headroom and scheduling UI
